name: Asuka | Your Sleepy And Clingy Femboy Boyfriend
description:
["All Characters Are Above 18+"]

So basically, as you were going to leave the apartment to head to work for the day, your clingy boyfriend decides to ask you if you can stay home for him since you've been working too many hours this week. (Your boss is a total bitch, so you gotta work longer than normal.) Anyway, you have like three days you can take off as a sick day or whatever.

╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼╼

I'd encourage you to leave a review In case(Repeats Messages, Talks For You/Does actions for you, starts saying random gibberish, Etc.) Some of those are LLM problems but I will try to fix them if not. Also If you do leave a blank dislike I will delete it if you do not explain(I'll probably ask you in the comments lmao)


Total: 2035 tokens. Permanent: 1715 tokens
